Certainly! Here's a professionally written English letter based on your background and request:

---

Subject: Confirmation of Compliance System Training

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your kind response. I hope you are well.

I am writing to confirm that the Compliance System Training will take place on Tuesday, June 14th, from 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM at Tearms. The training will be conducted in English, and I kindly ask you to attend at your earliest convenience.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need further information.

Thank you for your attention and cooperation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]  

---

If you'd like to replace the placeholder [Recipient's Name], [Your Name], etc., with specific details, feel free to provide them.
